notes:
v0.1.8 — Smart Timezone Update
• Adaptive Timezone: App now respects each user's preferred timezone (set in Profile) — no more forcing Vietnam time for everyone.
• Email Time Fix: Notification emails now show the correct local time for each recipient based on their profile setting.
• Calendar Sync Fix: Events no longer span multiple days — dates now sync accurately to Google Calendar.
• Live Timezone: Changing your timezone in Profile takes effect instantly without re-login.
• GCal Push Fix: Events pushed to Google Calendar now use the participant's own timezone.
